🏷️ PR Title (Conventional Commits):
<type>: <short summary>  (e.g., feat: add JWT auth middleware)
Types: ✨ feat | 🐛 fix | ♻️ refactor | 🚀 perf | 🧹 chore | 📚 docs | 🤖 ci | ✅ test | 🔐 security
-->

## ✍️ Summary
<!-- What and why? A concise description of the change and the problem it solves. -->
-

## 🔗 Related Issues / 🎫 Tickets
<!-- Link issues and auto-close if applicable -->
Fixes #  
Refs #

## 🧩 Changes
<!-- High-level bullet list of important changes -->
- 

## 🖼️ Screenshots / 🎥 Recordings (UI)
<!-- Before/After images or short Loom/GIF if UI changes -->
-

## 🧪 How to Test
<!-- Exact steps for reviewers/QA to verify -->
1. 
2. 
3. 

### ✅ Automated Tests
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration/E2E tests added/updated
- Notes:

## ⚠️ Risk & Impact
<!-- What could break? Which areas are impacted? -->
- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Impacted areas: 
- User-facing? Yes / No

## 🚀 Rollout Plan
- Deploy to: Dev → Staging → Prod
- Feature flag(s):  
- Config toggles / env vars:
- **Backout plan:** (revert PR? toggle flag? rollback migration?)

## 🔒 Security & Privacy
- [ ] No secrets/keys committed
- [ ] AuthN/AuthZ rules reviewed; least privilege enforced
- [ ] Input validated & parameterized queries (no SQL injection)
- [ ] Sensitive data handling documented (PII/PHI) and minimized
- [ ] Dependency changes reviewed for CVEs (SCA)
- Notes:

## ⚡ Performance
- [ ] No significant perf impact
- [ ] Benchmarks/metrics attached (if applicable)
- [ ] N+1 queries avoided / caching considered
- Notes:

## 🧨 Breaking Changes
- [ ] Public API/contract changed
- [ ] Requires client/app updates
- Migration notes:

## 🗄️ Database / ☁️ Infra Changes
- Schema/migration scripts: 
- Rollback scripts:
- Infra (AWS/Terraform/CloudFormation) changes:
- Data backfill required? Yes / No

## 📈 Observability
- [ ] Logs/metrics/traces added
- Dashboards/alerts updated:
- Runbooks updated:

## 📝 Documentation
- [ ] README / user docs
- [ ] API docs / OpenAPI
- [ ] Commented complex logic
- Links:

## 🧰 Checklist
- [ ] Code builds & lints cleanly
- [ ] All tests green locally/CI
- [ ] PR is small & focused (or clearly labeled “large” with rationale)
- [ ] Semantic PR title (conventional commits)
- [ ] Changelog / release notes updated (if user-visible)

## 👀 Reviewer Notes
<!-- Anything to pay close attention to? Edge cases, tradeoffs, follow-ups -->
-

## 📬 Post-Merge Tasks
- [ ] Create follow-up tickets
- [ ] Announce change / update runbook
- [ ] Tag release / update version
